examples: The book is essentially a taster for those unfamiliar with the subject.
There are eight spaces available for the taster session.
We will be holding a free taster session on 23rd May, at 10 am, to demonstrate the variety of effective and active exercises.
"The only thing you can say for sure is that you're eating something, " said one taster.
And that is a mere taster of Mr Heard's fascinating, at times frankly loopy, cornucopia.
